name: PhD Student
history: PhD student in a science field with deep involvement in music. Previously led a college band and currently participates in a jazz group. Declined a leadership position in the jazz group. Reports mental health struggles and feels disconnected from colleagues in the scientific work environment due to differing values and work habits.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must excel in all my endeavors to be valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I can't keep up, I am failing.
coping_strategies: Avoids leadership roles and social interactions that may lead to rejection.
situation: Experiencing difficulty during jazz rehearsals, requiring repeated attempts to progress.
auto_thought: I'm not good enough to lead or keep up with others.
behavior: Avoids taking on leadership roles and struggles with participation in group activities.
